headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://*.vercel-scripts.com https://*.vercel-insights.com https://*.vercel-analytics.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' https://*.vercel-insights.com https://*.vercel-analytics.com; frame-ancestors 'none'
